sub_modules.lpf_coeff_bank: Pure-combinational coefficient generator for a normalized odd-length Hamming-windowed low-pass FIR; emits flattened IEEE-754 coefficient words.
sub_modules.fp32_mul: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision multiply model using internal real conversion and result re-encoding.
sub_modules.fp32_add: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision add model using internal real conversion and result re-encoding.
